product test only.
It does not attempt to prove theology.

Standalone Lean kernel proving the abstract entropy-attenuation structure.
- `TheophysicsProductionKernel.lean`

- `narrow_product_test/`" }, { "title": "Small Mathlib-backed Lean project for the concrete product test using", "text": "`S_eff = exp(-η S_prod)`." }, { "title": "Narrow Product Test", "text": "The Mathlib project tests two versions:" }, { "title": "Version A", "text": "Raw alignment factor:
`M ∈ [-1,1]`" }, { "title": "Local product:", "text": "`χ_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C`" }, { "title": "Lean proves:", "text": "- `S_eff > 0`
- `S_eff ≤ 1` when `η > 0` and `S_prod ≥ 0`
- `S_eff` decreases as `S_prod` increases
- `R = 0 -> χ_local = 0`
- zero in any multiplicative factor except `S_eff` forces `χ_local = 0`
- `χ_local > 0` only with the added sign condition `M > 0`
- monotonicity in `G` and antitonicity in `S_prod` require `M ≥ 0`
It also includes explicit counterexamples showing what fails when `M < 0`." }, { "title": "Version B", "text": "Effective alignment factor:
`M_eff = (1 + M) / 2`" }, { "title": "Local product:", "text": "`χ_local = G * M_eff * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C`" }, { "title": "Lean proves the same structural facts more cleanly because every multiplicative", "text": "factor is nonnegative under the stated bounds." }, { "title": "Key Lean File", "text": "- `narrow_product_test/NarrowProductTest/Basic.lean`
This is the main concrete proof file for the A/B comparison." }, { "title": "Verification", "text": "These checks passed:
- `lake env lean NarrowProductTest/Basic.lean`
- `lake env lean NarrowProductTest.lean`" }, { "title": "Recommendation", "text": "Version B is the cleaner formalization target for the Master Equation product
